news.headline: Avanos Medical, Inc. (NYSE: AVNS) to webcast Q3 2024 financial results conference call on Oct. 30 at 9 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Avanos Medical, Inc. (NYSE: AVNS) announced that it will be hosting a webcast to discuss the financial results and business highlights of the third quarter of 2024. The conference call is scheduled for October 30 at 9 a.m. Eastern Time. The company will also release a news statement providing more information on the event.

news.headline: TransUnion reports Q3 2024 results on Oct 23, 2024. Trading under NYSE: TRU.
news.summary: TransUnion, a company traded on the NYSE under the symbol TRU, revealed its financial results for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024, in Chicago on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Ryde reports S$4.4 million revenue in First Half 2024, down from S$5.2 million in 1H 2023, focusing on growth.
news.summary: Singapore-based Ryde Group Ltd (NYSE American: RYDE) unveiled its financial results for the first six months of 2024. The leading technology platform focused on mobility and quick commerce headquartered in Singapore disclosed a revenue of S$4.4 million (US$3.2 million) for the period, a decrease from S$5.2 million (US$3.9 million) in 1H 2023. The Company recently shifted to a 0% commission model in January.

news.headline: Crypto trader Miles Deutscher predicts Bitcoin could hit $100,000, advises focusing on 2-3 top altcoins per sector for gains.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency analyst Miles Deutscher is forecasting a significant increase in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and certain alternative coins in the near future, which could lead to profitable outcomes for investors. Deutscher recently highlighted the positive direction of Bitcoin in a YouTube video, pointing out that it has maintained levels higher than its 2021 peak for eight consecutive months. He foresees a potential climb for Bitcoin up to $100,000, supported by investments pouring into Bitcoin Spot ETFs. Deutscher also foresees increased market fluctuations, especially surrounding the U.S. election, advising investors to leverage these downturns to amass robust alternative coins. He is urging investors to seize opportunities during these slumps to gather impactful alternative coins within sectors like AI, meme coins, and real-world assets (RWA). Deutscher particularly holds high optimism towards meme coins.

news.headline: California Fish Grill uses Epson OmniLink TM-L100 for liner-free labeling, boosting efficiency in busy quick-service restaurants.
news.summary: A dependable thermal label printer that is compatible with liner-free labels is being utilized by a busy quick-service restaurant in Los Alamitos, California. The restaurant, California Fish Grill, prioritizes robust technology solutions at all its locations to enhance operational efficiency. This high-quality printer provides support to the restaurant's fast-casual setup. This news was announced on October 23, 2024, showcasing the importance of reliable technology in the restaurant industry.

news.headline: Frost & Sullivan's report on global blockchain hardware market trends up to 2024 reveals growth in modern economic systems.
news.summary: In the past few years, amidst the rapid advancement of global digital transformation, blockchain technology has emerged as a vital element of contemporary economic structures. With a significant presence in various sectors such as financial services, supply chain management, and data security, its influence continues to grow. Furthermore, the adoption of blockchain technology has notably increased, with the global market witnessing a surge in investments reaching multimillion-dollar figures.This evolution underscores the increasing recognition of blockchain's potential to revolutionize traditional practices and enhance operational efficiency across industries.

news.headline: 60% women workforce at Genus Power's manufacturing unit impresses U.S. Ambassador to India during visit with high-level U.S. delegation.
news.summary: Genus Power Infrastructures Limited in Jaipur, India, recently welcomed a notable American delegation on October 23, 2024. The U.S. Ambassador to India, Eric Garcetti, headed the delegation that also included Steve Olive, the Mission Director of USAID India, and Aaron Schubert, the Director of USAID India.

news.headline: HKMA releases results of 3-year HKD govt bond tender: bid-to-cover ratio of 3.89, annualized yield at 2.952%.
news.summary: Results from the recent 3-year HKD government bond tender were disclosed by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, showcasing a bid-to-cover ratio of 3.89 and an annualized yield of 2.952%.

news.headline: Binance ends referral program for Turkish users in compliance with local rules, ensuring service continuity. (Characters: 93)
news.summary: Binance recently revealed the cessation of its Retail Referral Program for individuals in Türkiye in order to adhere to local laws. This step was taken to avoid any interference with the continuation of its other services.

news.headline: Paralyzed Veterans of America CEO responds to DOT's record fine on American Airlines for mistreating disabled passengers.
news.summary: Paralyzed Veterans of America CEO, Carl Blake, recently commented on the Department of Transportation's significant penalty against American Airlines for their poor treatment of passengers with disabilities. The penalty, issued on October 23, 2024, marks a historic move towards ensuring the safety and dignity of all airline passengers. This action comes in response to the airline's failure to provide appropriate treatment to individuals with disabilities. The severity of the penalty underlines the importance of upholding standards in the airline industry, as it addresses a pressing issue affecting many travelers.

Frontier-Kemper wins $1.1B contract for Kensico-Eastview Connection Tunnel Project.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Tutor Perini Corporation (NYSE: TPC) revealed that its subsidiary, Frontier-Kemper Constructors, secured a contract worth around $1.1 billion from the New York City Department of Environmental Protection. The contract pertains to the Kensico-Eastview Connection Tunnel Project, which involves building a deep rock tunnel connecting the Kensico Reservoir and the Cat. The construction company is known for its expertise in civil, building, and specialty construction.

news.headline: Hand Tools and Accessories Market to hit US$ 31.4B by 2034, growing at 4.1% CAGR, with a US$ 10.4B opportunity between 2024-2034. Leading players include Stanley Black & Decker, Makita, and Klein Tools. North America to hold 36.9% market share by 2034.
news.summary: The global Hand Tools and Accessories Market is set to reach a valuation of US$21.0 billion in 2024 and is predicted to grow at a CAGR of 4.1% from 2024 to 2034, eventually reaching US$31.4 billion. The sector offers a variety of manual tools, powered hand tools, and accessories, benefitting from advancements in material science and ergonomics, resulting in improved functionality and comfort for users. Sectors like construction and automobile are driving the demand for high-quality, durable tools due to industrialization and infrastructure growth in developing countries. Innovations in technology, like smart tools, are expanding market segments. North America is expected to hold a significant market share of 36.9% by 2034. Key players in the market include Stanley Black & Decker, Snap-on Incorporated, Bosch GmbH, and others. Cutting tools are anticipated to grow by 4.6% CAGR. Overall, organizations investing in product development are likely to capitalize on market opportunities in this evolving industry.

news.headline: Revolution Medicines shares new data from RMC-6236 study for advanced Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma patients.
BostonGene to attend EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium on Molecular Targets and Cancer Therapeutics in Barcelona on Oct 23-25, 2024. #AI #CancerResearch
news.summary: BostonGene, a top provider of AI-driven molecular and immune profiling solutions, has confirmed its participation in the 36th EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium on Molecular Targets and Cancer Therapeutics (ENA 2024). This symposium will convene global academics, scientists, and industry experts to deliberate on advancements in drug research and development.

news.headline: Trustly to process $100B annually, leading in Pay by Bank surge with over 112M global customers.

This highlights a significant change in the payments sector as merchants globally seek card alternatives. Over 112 million consumers have utilized Trustly's products, demonstrating the popularity of Pay by Bank options at checkout. Trustly, Inc., the Americas division of Trustly AB, is making strides towards this goal.

news.headline: Lookout Inc. integrates AI chatbot by Embrace.ai in Partner Hub to streamline access for partners. Boosts efficiency.

This move aims to enhance access to critical sales resources and improve efficiency for the Company’s partners, including alliance, technology integration, channel, and managed security service provider (MSSP) partners. The Lookout Partner Hub, developed using Impartner’s partner relationship management (PRM) solution, is designed to facilitate smoother collaboration and communication with partners. This integration is set to streamline operations and drive productivity, benefiting all stakeholders involved.

news.headline: Amazon offers Prime members a $0.10 discount per gallon at 7,000 gas stations, potentially saving $70/year on gas. Electric vehicle charging savings coming in 2025.
news.summary: In Seattle, Amazon revealed that Prime members (NASDAQ: AMZN) will now enjoy a discount of $0.10 per gallon at about 7,000 bp, Amoco, and ampm fuel stations nationwide. This deal has the potential to save Prime members around $70 annually on fuel expenses at eligible sites*. Furthermore, the company has hinted at forthcoming savings on transportation costs. By 2025, Amazon aims to introduce a cost-saving offer for electric vehicle charging through bp pulse, which is owned by bp.

news.headline: Dr. Makoto Kuro-o, pioneer of Klotho anti-aging gene, joins Klotho Neurosciences, Inc. as Scientific Advisor.
news.summary: Renowned scientist Dr. Makoto Kuro-o, who discovered the Klotho anti-aging gene, has recently been appointed as a scientific advisor for Klotho Neurosciences, Inc. Dr. Kuro-o's groundbreaking work in the field of aging genetics has revolutionized our understanding of the aging process and provided potential avenues for anti-aging interventions. This partnership brings together Dr. Kuro-o's expertise and Klotho Neurosciences, Inc.'s commitment to developing innovative treatments for age-related conditions. It is expected that Dr. Kuro-o's involvement will greatly benefit the company in advancing their research and development efforts.

news.headline: Bionomics (Nasdaq: BNOX) to present at ThinkEquity Conference in NY on Oct. 30, 2024, focusing on CNS disorders.
news.summary: Adelaide, Australia and Cambridge, Massachusetts, October 23, 2024 - Bionomics Limited (Nasdaq: BNOX), a clinical-stage biotechnology company, is developing groundbreaking allosteric ion channel modulators for serious central nervous system (CNS) disorders. The company will join and present at the upcoming ThinkEquity Conference on October 30, 2024, at the Mandarin Oriental Hotel in New York City. This event is crucial for sharing their innovative approach to addressing the high unmet medical needs of patients.

news.headline: Antaisolar partners with Bahra Electric to set up JV company and factory in Saudi Arabia during Solar & Storage Live KSA 2024 expo.
news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on October 23, 2024, Solar & Storage Live KSA 2024 was held from October 15 to 16. Antaisolar revealed at the event that they have entered into a partnership with Bahra Electric to create a joint venture (JV) company and factory.

news.headline: Canadian luxury real estate market steady; Toronto & Vancouver see price drops, Calgary excels. Montreal surged 83% in Sep.Character count: 100
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, Canada's luxury real estate market maintained steady sales despite a slowing economy and geopolitical tensions. In Toronto, luxury home sales over $4 million saw a 3% year-over-year increase in July and August, with September sales up 9%. In Vancouver, sales over $4 million declined by 52% in September. Montreal saw a strong market with sales over $1 million up 15% in July and August and 83% in September. Calgary experienced a 31% increase in $1 million-plus sales in July and August. The Bank of Canada's interest rate cuts have positively impacted the market, with buyers anticipating further reductions in 2025. Vancouver's luxury market softened with a decrease in sales of properties over $4 million. Top-tier sales in Montreal improved, while Calgary's luxury market performed well with sales climbing 31% in July and August. Sotheby's predicts a stable luxury market in the coming months, but long-term population growth may intensify competition for housing.

news.headline: 2024 Silk Road Week in Paris ends with "Charm of the Silk Roads: Chinese Silk Arts" exhibition opening at Musée Guimet.
news.summary: On October 14, 2024 in Paris, the "2024 Silk Road Week" concluded with a remarkable event - the inauguration of the "Charm of the Silk Roads: Chinese Silk Arts" exhibition at the Exhibition Hall of Hôtel d'Heidelbach, Musée national des arts asiatiques-Guimet. The exhibition showcased the rich heritage of Chinese silk arts and marked the end of the successful week-long cultural event.

news.headline: Vertiv's Q3 2024 net sales hit $2,074 million, up 19% from last year's Q3. Organic orders increased ~37% compared to last year.
news.summary: Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE: VRT) in Columbus, Ohio, a leading provider of critical digital infrastructure solutions, announced its financial results for the third quarter ending September 30, 2024. The company reported net sales of $2.074 billion in Q3 2024, marking a $331 million increase, or 19%, from the same period last year. Organic orders for the twelve-month period ending September 2024, excluding foreign exchange impacts, saw a significant rise of approximately 37% compared to the same period in 2023.

news.headline: Investors in Metagenomi notified to contact Levi & Korsinsky before Nov. 25, 2024 regarding class action lawsuit - MGX.

news.headline: La Française des Jeux exercises squeeze-out right in Kindred Group plc, notice received on 3 Oct 2024.
news.summary: In Valletta, Malta, on October 23, 2024, an announcement was made to the shareholders of Kindred Group plc ("Kindred" or the "Company") regarding a squeeze-out notice received from La Française des Jeux ("FDJ") on October 3, 2024. This notice, in accordance with Article 34B, signifies FDJ's intention to acquire the remaining shares of Kindred. Important numbers associated with this notice and potential squeeze-out include the date it was received (October 3, 2024) and the relevant provisions of Article 34B.

news.headline: Concentric AB to hold extraordinary general meeting on Nov 15, 2024 in Redditch, England. Details to be provided in notice.

news.headline: US falling behind on crypto regulations, but Tether CEO predicts upcoming change post November elections.
news.summary: Paolo Ardoino, the CEO of Tether, mentioned that the United States has been slow in implementing cryptocurrency regulations. However, he anticipates a potential shift following the November elections.
